caption: A modern open-concept kitchen and living area are captured in these frames. The kitchen features dark brown cabinetry, white countertops, and a stainless steel vent hood hanging from the ceiling. A red tea kettle sits on a black gas stovetop integrated into the counter. In the background, a living room is visible with a brown leather sofa and a red patterned rug on the floor. Large windows with beige curtains allow soft light into the space. The camera pans smoothly across the room, starting with a wide shot of the kitchen and living area, then shifting focus toward the left, revealing more of the kitchen's cabinetry and a built-in oven. No people are present in the scene, and there is no visible on-screen text or logos throughout the sequence.
